chart_refs: SHORT SLEEVE V NECK JUMPER CHEST: 47.5/49.5/51.5/53.5/55.5/57.5 flat
why: 34D estimated bust 96.5cm; required chest 104.5cm with 8cm top ease; UK14 chest circumference 107cm is first pass. Upper-chest derived check also passes at UK14.

chart_refs: SHORT SLEEVE CREW NECK JUMPER CHEST UK18 flat 57.5 = 115cm circumference
why: 36DD estimated bust 104.1cm; +8cm ease requires 112.1cm chest, first pass UK18.

chart_refs: ELEVATED CREW T-SHIRT CHEST UK12 flat 53.5 = 107cm; UK14 flat 55.5 = 111cm
why: max(bustCm 100, bra estimate 91.4) = 100; +8cm ease requires 108cm; UK14 first pass.

chart_refs: BANDEAU TOP CHEST UK18 flat 45.5 = 91cm circumference
why: 32B estimated bust 86.4cm; bandeau ease 3cm requires 89.4cm; UK18 is first pass. Confidence medium because bandeau chest is fitted/low-ease and usual size conflicts.

chart_refs: CHEESE CLOTH SHIRT CHEST UK8 flat 54 = 108cm; UK12 flat 58 = 116cm; SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists
why: Bust passes in UK8, but usual-size anchor and broad-shoulder soft rule keep UK12 as intended fit; UK14 is alternate for more shoulder room.

chart_refs: REGULAR V NECK T-SHIRT CHEST UK10 flat 51.5 = 103cm
why: Bra-derived bust 91.4cm plus close-fit ease 5cm requires 96.4cm, so UK8 technically passes; usual UK12, narrow shoulders and close preference produce UK10 as a conservative size-down, not UK8.

chart_refs: LINEN LOOSE TROUSER WAIST UK16 flat 37 = 74cm; HIP UK14 flat 57 = 114cm
why: Waist requirement 72cm with 2cm ease first passes at UK16; hip requirement 110cm with 6cm ease passes at UK14; max critical size is UK16.

chart_refs: LINEN LOOSE SHORT HIP UK18 flat 62 = 124cm
why: Hip requirement 117cm with 6cm ease first passes at UK18; hip beats usual size.

chart_refs: KNIT CO-ORD TROUSER LOUNGE SET bucket 12-14: WAIST flat 35 = 70cm, HIP flat 49 = 98cm, INSEAM 78cm
why: Usual UK14 maps to 12-14 bucket. Waist sits just above relaxed flat waist; length issue shows 16-18 as alternate because inseam grades to 80cm.

chart_refs: LINEN BIAS MAXI SKIRT WAIST UK14 flat 41 = 82cm; HIP UK12 flat 53 = 106cm
why: Waist requirement 77cm with 2cm ease first passes UK14; hip requirement 106cm passes UK12; max critical size UK14.

chart_refs: CHEESE CLOTH SKIRT WAIST UK16 flat 37 = 74cm; no HIP row
why: Waist requirement 72cm first passes UK16. Hip is ignored for scoring because no HIP row exists, lowering confidence and showing no-hip-row warning.

chart_refs: CHEESE CLOTH DRESS CHEST UK18 flat 50 = 100cm; WAIST UK16 flat 44 = 88cm
why: Dress bust is restrictive: bust requirement 106cm with 8cm ease exceeds max chest 100cm, so largest size UK18 is recommended with fit warning; waist would pass UK16.

chart_refs: JUMPSUIT HIP UK18 flat 57 = 114cm; CHEST UK14 flat 50 = 100cm
why: Hip requirement 112cm with 8cm dress/jumpsuit ease first passes UK18; hip beats usual size.

chart_refs: BLAZER CHEST UK18 flat 59 = 118cm; no SHOULDER TO SHOULDER row
why: 36C estimated bust 99.1cm plus 12cm outerwear ease requires 111.1cm, first pass UK16; broad-shoulder stylist rule nudges structured blazer to UK18 between sizes.

chart_refs: SWIMWEAR COVER UP CHEST S/M flat 56 = 112cm; L/XL flat 60 = 120cm
why: 36D estimated bust 101.6cm plus 10cm cover-up regular ease requires 111.6cm; S/M technically just passes, but usual UK14 maps to L/XL and two-size threshold puts UK14 into L/XL styling.
